postReview.title: England 1-1 Switzerland (aet, 5-3 pens): Three Lions edge into last four after Pickford's penalty heroics
postReview.description: Trent Alexander-Arnold scored the decisive penalty as England booked their place in the semi-final of Euro 2024 after beating Switzerland.

QAData.question: Who won between England and Switzerland on Sat, 06 Jul 2024 16:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: England won 1–1 (5–3) over Switzerland after penalties on Sat, 06 Jul 2024 16:00:00 GMT.
